title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Creates a mysterious, engaging start
content:
✔ Creates a mysterious, engaging start to every class.

📜 4. When Does the Observer’s Effect Activate?

📜 The Observer’s passive ability builds over time but triggers only under specific conditions.

✔ If the Observer remains passive for three weeks, their influence becomes stronger.
✔ After five weeks, their choices start affecting events behind the scenes.
✔ If they break their rule of non-intervention, they suffer an XP penalty and lose their accumulated power.

📖 Example: Observer Influence Over Time
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 389 (chunk 389/555)
